output.question: current population of London

sources.title: London, UK Metro Area Population (1950-2026) | MacroTrends

output.findings:
According to Wikipedia, London had a population of 9.1 million people in 2024, making it the capital and largest city of England and the United Kingdom.

World Population Review estimates London's 2026 population at 9,188,200, based on UK local authority data and internal projections, reflecting a 0.54% annual growth from the previous year.

For the broader metropolitan area, MacroTrends reports the current metro area population of London in 2026 is 9,927,000, representing a 0.87% increase from 2025.
